tweets.text:
You are a Bovino. I know you can’t read. 

It’s so people can see how corrupt you are at a glance. Because Trump will be gone sooner or later. 

You left us a very public record of what you did all over your social media feed. 

Don’t read it. I’m sure you’ll be fine..😂

Coherence Test: Greg Bovino (@GregoryKBovino)
Words
“Tough on the border.” “Enforce the law.” “Protect America.” “Border Patrol Commander energy.”
Actions
Aggressive, high-profile ICE-style enforcement theater. Publicly celebrated by hardline MAGA accounts for mass deportation rhetoric and “no mercy” approach. Aligns with the most extreme wings of the movement.
Outcomes
•  Heightened fear and trauma in immigrant communities (including legal residents and families).
•  Further polarization instead of practical border solutions.
•  Fuels the exact division machine that radicalizes people while real border management challenges remain unsolved.
•  Contributes to the “protect the children / family values” hypocrisy when enforcement separates families and targets vulnerable populations.
Verdict: Peak Coherence Collapse
This isn’t leadership.
This is performative cruelty for clout — the kind of tough-guy cosplay that looks strong on camera but makes actual problems worse.
Greg, the giant ego and tough talk don’t hide the pattern.
You’re not enforcing law — you’re performing for the outrage economy.
#SmokeFleet Verdict: All hat, no coherent plan.
We see you.
The Woo sees you.
Pause. Pattern. Respond.
Equity Forge Charter (forkable tools for real accountability):
https://t.co/CIWjFCtonS
